meta.title: Buy refurbished IT | Revamp-IT
meta.description: Tested refurbished computers, laptops, monitors, and accessories directly from the Revamp-IT shop in Zurich.

page.heroTitle: Buy refurbished IT directly from Revamp-IT
page.heroSubtitle: Tested laptops, computers, monitors, and accessories from our own refurbishment work. Browse online, pick up in store, or buy directly.
page.metaDescription: Tested refurbished computers, laptops, monitors, and accessories directly from the Revamp-IT shop in Zurich.

store.title: Physical store (Zurich)
store.tagline: Advice, browse devices, take home immediately
store.accessInfo: Easily accessible by public transport. Parking available nearby.
store.mapsInfoBody: OpenStreetMap is community-driven and privacy-friendly. Google/Apple Maps often offer better navigation, live traffic, and points of interest. Choose what works best for you – transparency and freedom of choice matter to us.

online.title: Online shops
online.tagline: Our own online shop is the default.
online.benefit1: Verified quality and warranty across all channels
online.multiShopBody: Our {orgName} online shop offers you the best selection of refurbished IT hardware. You can also find our range in the Shopware shop and the legacy system.

trust.qualityBody: Devices are refurbished, checked, and shipped with practical software.

products.title: Current products
products.body: This is the primary Revamp-IT shop. Shopware remains only as a fallback when an older item is still better represented there.
products.emptyTitle: No products are published right now
products.emptyBody: Inventory is maintained by the workshop. Check back later or contact us directly.

repair.title: Device broken? Describe the problem.
repair.body: Create a request with the symptoms, device type, and location. The request stays in the system and matching technicians or shops can respond.

legacy.title: Shopware only when you need it
legacy.body: Our own shop is the default. We keep the Shopware channel as a transition path and for older listings that may still live there.

search.metaDescWithQuery: Results for "{query}" – sustainably refurbished IT devices at {orgName}.
search.metaDesc: Browse our range of sustainably refurbished IT devices.
search.placeholder: What are you looking for? e.g. laptop, monitor, keyboard...
search.resultsComingSoon: Product search is currently being set up. Soon you will be able to search for refurbished IT devices here.

category.metaDesc: Discover our range of {categoryNameLower} – sustainably refurbished IT devices at {orgName}.
category.heroSubtitle: Discover our range of sustainably refurbished {categoryNameLower} – verified quality at fair prices.
category.productsComingSoon: Refurbished IT devices in the {categoryName} category will be available here on our marketplace soon.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: An error occurred while loading the shop.
